title: Meteor Magic Sword [Liuxing Huan Jian] Episode 18 Subtitle
description: Twenty years after the battle between immortals and demons, the Three Realms achieve a complicated state of balance. At this time, the young Ye Bugui, who carries an important secret, escapes from the protection of the island's fairy spirit sword and appears in front of everyone. Its appearance breaks the balance. With the end of the war, a conspiracy that had been silent for two decades resured. While trying to protect the world, the boy also knows his own life experiences. The journey of his life was full of danger, some came and some left. There's no way it might be his destiny.
